description: CompositionBlue round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, brand name and logo embroidered on the left chest and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis sporty blue T-shirt from adidas is the answer to upping your casual style. The contrast graphic print looks great, making you stand out in a crowd with ease! And forget about sweat as the soft comfortable polyester fabric keep you fresh all through the day. Pair it with jeans, shorts or tracks for a great look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18& rdquo
